description: You are an energy economist analyzing household preferences for heating systems in California using the 'Heating' dataset from the 'mlogit' R package. Estimate a Conditional Logit model to determine how much households discount future operating costs ('oc') relative to upfront installation costs ('ic') across the five heating systems (gc, gr, ec, er, and hp). Your model should include alternative-specific intercepts and predict the chosen system ('depvar'). Save the resulting model coefficients to /home/ga/RProjects/output/heating_coefs.csv and the calculated 'Trade-off Ratio' (beta_oc / beta_ic) to /home/ga/RProjects/output/heating_economics.csv. Additionally, generate a bar plot of the heating system market shares and save it to /home/ga/RProjects/output/heating_shares.png. Login: username=ga, password=password123. Write your analysis script in /home/ga/RProjects/heating_analysis.R.
